metadata.title: Smart Disbursement Solution | Meezan Bank | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Smart Disbursement Solution is Pakistan’s first Islamic Disbursement Solution for its corporate customers who have a Core / Branch Banking account with Meezan Bank. Through this solution, corporate customers will be able to open employee wallets easily and disburse bulk payments directly into their wallets.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Smart Disbursement Solution The Smart Way to Disburse Funds Smart Disbursement Solution is Pakistan’s first Islamic Disbursement Solution for its corporate customers who have a Core / Branch Banking account with Meezan Bank. Through this solution, corporate customers will be able to open employee wallets easily and disburse bulk payments directly into their wallets. Requirements for Using Meezan Smart Disbursement Solution Account can only be used for disbursement transactions if the corporate customer has an existing account with the Bank. Valid disbursement agreement between corporate client and Meezan Bank. Account opening request must be submitted by the corporate client on its letter head including details of employees. Pay Pak Debit Cards issued on Employee Wallet only be used locally. (Charges Apply) Key Features Instant account opening Instant bulk account opening Link channel Facility to link existing corporate account to Smart Disbursement Solution Disbursement Instant and direct disbursement into the accounts of employees Withdrawal Cash withdrawal from any Bank’s ATM Internet and Online Banking Free internet and mobile banking services Deposit No requirement of minimum deposit Terms & Conditions Key Fact Statements (KFS) How the Smart Disbursement Account Works? Download Fatwa Smart Disbursement Account is based on Qarz Contract where the Bank is liable to pay your money back on demand. The Bank can use these funds for investment or other purpose. This account allows you the peace of mind of having your money safely deposited with a bank with the additional assurance that the Bank is not investing money in activities that contravene Shariah principles. Want to Open a Disbursement Solution Account Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in opening your account. Locate a Branch MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum!
